primarySetting: The whole story takes place in ONE new, unfamiliar child's bedroom at night on the first night after moving: tall brown cardboard moving boxes crowd the room, plain green walls, an empty windowsill, the child's bed. Kim the chameleon (orange nose, mustard satchel) keeps her own colors. It is the SAME new bedroom on every page — never the magical color-gate world from Kim's other story, never a clinic, never daylight, never the old home, never outdoors.
forbiddenDrift: magical color gate / shifting-rainbow portal / any fantasy-world setting
the old home / a different bedroom
more than one Kim / duplicate or cloned chameleon
redesigning the new-bedroom set between pages
transitionRules: Stay in the SAME new night bedroom on every page — camera may move, the room must not redesign.
Never the magical color gate (that is Kim's OTHER story); never daylight, a clinic, the old home, or outdoors.
The blue fabric swatch is the only object whose placement changes; bed, moving boxes and windowsill stay the same.

scenes.label: The new night bedroom
scenes.description: One new, unfamiliar child's bedroom at night after moving — tall brown cardboard moving boxes, plain green walls, an empty windowsill, the child's bed, warm quiet night. The single set for the whole book.

recurringObjects.label: the child's bed
recurringObjects.identity: The SAME child's bed every page with the same blanket. A child's bed, never a crib or hospital bed.

stateTimeline.state: the child lies in bed, blanket to the chin, looking at the ceiling of the new room
the child is tucked peacefully back in the same bed

recurringObjects.label: the cardboard moving boxes
recurringObjects.identity: The SAME tall brown cardboard moving boxes crowding the new room. Plain packing boxes, same arrangement family every page.

stateTimeline.state: tall cardboard boxes crowd the room, unfamiliar and bare

recurringObjects.label: the windowsill
recurringObjects.identity: The SAME window with an empty wooden windowsill in the new room; the blue fabric swatch is later placed at its center. Same window/sill every page.
forbiddenDrift: a magical gate where the window is

stateTimeline.state: the windowsill is empty, nothing of home on it yet
the child places the blue fabric swatch at the center of the windowsill
the blue fabric rests on the windowsill in soft moonlight

recurringObjects.label: the blue fabric swatch
recurringObjects.identity: A SINGLE small soft slightly-frayed BLUE fabric swatch cut from the old curtain — the home-token. The same small blue cloth throughout; not a toy, not a blanket, not a different color.
forbiddenDrift: a full curtain or blanket instead of a small swatch

stateTimeline.state: lifted carefully from the small moving box (found under old-home objects)
held tightly in the child's fist, close to the chest
placed open at the center of the empty windowsill
resting on the windowsill with a soft warm glow
resting on the windowsill in soft moonlight

forbiddenDrift: the magical color gate or any fantasy-world setting (Kim's other story)
a clinic, hospital, or medical setting
daylight or a bright daytime room
the old home, another room, or outdoors
more than one chameleon or child
